title: Lead AI Engineer
company_focus: Digital services transformation and Workday solutions
description:
Join Kainos and Shape the Future

At Kainos, we’re problem solvers, innovators, and
collaborators - driven by a shared mission to create real
impact. Whether we’re transforming digital services for
millions, delivering cutting-edge Workday solutions, or
pushing the boundaries of technology, we do it together.

We believe in a people-first culture, where your ideas are
valued, your growth is supported, and your contributions
truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be part of a diverse,
ambitious team that celebrates creativity and collaboration.

Ready to make your mark? Join us and be part of something
bigger.

As a Lead AI Engineer within the Workday Practice at Kainos,
you will play a critical role in bridging the gap between
data science and software engineering to productionise AI
and machine learning solutions. You will work closely with
data scientists, software engineers, and product teams to
deliver robust, scalable AI solutions that enhance our
Workday product offerings. Your focus will be on ensuring
seamless integration of AI models into production systems,
optimising performance, and maintaining the reliability of
AI-driven features.


Essential Experience:

- Extensive experience in software development, with
  proficiency in languages such as Python, Java, or C++.
  Emphasis on writing clean, efficient, and maintainable
  code for production-grade AI solutions.

- Proven experience in deploying AI/ML models to production
  environments, ensuring scalability, reliability, and
  performance. Familiarity with MLOps practices, including
  CI/CD pipelines, model versioning, and monitoring.

- Comprehensive experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure,
  or GCP) and cloud-native AI tools, such as SageMaker,
  Vertex AI, or Azure ML Studio. Ability to design and
  deploy cloud-based AI solutions.

- Proficiency in using containerization technologies (e.g.,
  Docker) and orchestration tools (e.g., Kubernetes) to
  build and manage scalable AI solutions.

- Strong skills in data engineering, including building data
  pipelines, data wrangling, and integrating AI solutions
  with enterprise data systems.

- Exposure to agile software development practices and
  experience working in agile teams.

- Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate
  with cross-functional teams, translate technical
  requirements into actionable solutions, and communicate
  effectively with both technical and non-technical
  stakeholders.

Desirable Experience:

- MSc or PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Software
  Engineering, or a related field.

- Familiarity with Workday APIs, data structures, and
  integration patterns.

- Experience designing and implementing generative AI
  solutions using large language models (e.g., OpenAI GPT,
  Hugging Face Transformers).

- Expertise in applying deep learning techniques (e.g., CNNs,
  RNNs, Transformers) to real-world problems.

- Active participation in knowledge-sharing activities such as
  conferences, workshops, or blogs, contributing to the AI
  community and fostering innovation.

Who you are:

- Determined – you’re flexible and overcome obstacles to get
  the job done to achieve personal and team goals

- Creative – you actively look for better ways to do things
  using the latest AI technologies to find fresh solutions
  to complex problems

- Honest – always constructive when giving or receiving
  feedback, being transparent and truthful when dealing with
  others

- Respectful – you treat others as you would like to be
  treated being encouraging, accepting and supportive to
  everyone you deal with

- Cooperative – you share information, knowledge and
  experience, understanding the mutual benefits of team
  working.

Embracing our differences  

At Kainos, we believe in the power of diversity, equity and
inclusion. We are committed to building a team that is as
diverse as the world we live in, where everyone is valued,
respected, and given an equal chance to thrive.   We
actively seek out talented people from all backgrounds,
regardless of age, race, ethnicity, gender, sexual
orientation, religion, disability, or any other
characteristic that makes them who they are.   We also
believe every candidate deserves a level playing field.

Our friendly talent acquisition team is here to support you
every step of the way, so if you require any accommodations
or adjustments, we encourage you to reach out.

We understand that everyone's journey is different, and by
having a private conversation we can ensure that our
recruitment process is tailored to your needs.
responsibilities: Bridge the gap between data science and software engineering to productionise AI and ML solutions
Deploy and integrate AI models into production systems for Workday product offerings
Optimize performance and maintain reliability of AI-driven features
Build data pipelines and integrate AI solutions with enterprise data systems
Design and deploy cloud-based AI solutions using cloud-native AI tools
Implement MLOps practices including CI/CD pipelines, model versioning, and monitoring
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including data scientists, software engineers, and product teams
use_cases: Enhance Workday product offerings with AI-driven features
Enterprise HR and workforce management AI solutions
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves productionizing AI/ML solutions and
deploying models to production environments with MLOps
practices. The position requires hands-on work deploying and
integrating AI models into production systems, including
optional experience with LLMs and generative AI solutions,
making it an ai-first role.
